analysis.description: microcoachLLMAnalysis — identifies misconceptions from PPQ assessment data

frequencyThresholds.description: Percent of class affected to classify a misconception's frequency label (3 tiers: many/some/few)

misconceptionScoring.description: Weights for the composite score that determines which misconception is isCore. Weights should sum to 1.0.

conceptualSeverityScale.description: Guide for the LLM when estimating conceptual severity: 1.0 = structural conceptual misunderstanding of the math concept; 0.6 = mixed conceptual and procedural; 0.3 = procedural/execution error only

coreSelection.description: Rules for designating the isCore misconception and filtering secondary misconceptions

alternativeQualifier.description: A misconception below minimum prevalence can still be priority 1 if BOTH conditions are met

futureScoringSignals.description: Placeholder for future data not yet in model. When PPQ confidence ratings and student reflection responses become available, incorporate them as additional scoring signals.

nextStepOption.description: microcoachNextStepOption — generates one classroom activity per format per misconception
